sub_modules.fp_fir_sample_window_comb: Pure combinational next-window generator for the FIR sample shift register; inserts the new valid sample or +0.0 and shifts older samples.
sub_modules.fp_fir_tap_products_comb: Pure combinational tap multiplier bank; multiplies each IEEE-754 single-precision sample by its corresponding coefficient.
sub_modules.fp_fir_sum_tree_comb: Pure combinational floating-point accumulator for all tap products, producing the FIR dot-product result.
